title: Zeqeey Heavy Duty Round Metal Steel Trimmer Line Nylon Overlay Rope with Rortable Reel, 3mm x 27m, Universal Replacement Strimmer String Line Cord, 0.12 inch
features: This strong strimmer line is suitable for a wide range of common grass trimmer models powered by petrol or electricity. Ensure that the openings on your trimmer's head and spool are capable of accommodating a trim line with a diameter of 3.0mm or 0.12 inches.

The replacement strimmer cord boasts a diameter of 3.0mm or 0.12 inches, and stretches approximately 27 meters in length. The core wire's diameter is roughly 1mm, contributing to the enhanced durability of the trimming cord. It is designed for light, medium to heavy duty weed trimming in different needs, including residential yard, garden, and public park.

This robust, heavy duty universal steel trimmer line features a metallic core encased in a translucent nylon sheath. Its construction helps to minimize operational noise without compromising on efficiency.

The round weed eater rope is characterized by its robustness, longevity, resistance to abrasion, and ease of installation. As a spare trimming rope accessory for your lawnmower, it facilitates swift weed cutting and reduces the time spent on yard work.

Due to the dry conditions of the storage warehouse, the nylon material may harden over extended periods. To regain the line's flexibility, it is advisable to soak it in water for a full day prior to use, which will restore its resilience.
